title: Inspection Lamp 2000 Lumen 2 Pack Rechargeable LED Work Light with Magnetic and Foldable 180° Rotating Stand and Magnetic Torch for Maintenance Work Night Walking Camping Emergency
features: 【2 LED work light with 7 lighting modes】The LED workshop work light has 7 lighting modes: LED torch bright/dark/flashing/COB light on/dark/red light on/red light on/red light flashing. Click to change the light mode, long press the switch to turn on the red light mode. Two lamps make your work environment more illuminated.

【Light Specifications and IPX6 Waterproof】The LED work light workshop light has 3 types: 2 x XPE, 24COB white light and 12COB red light. LED work light with up to 1000 lumens. The waterproof magnetic LED inspection light IPX6 is made of ABS and aluminium alloy, is dust-proof and splash-proof.

【Power bank function and rechargeable work light】the LED car workshop light can be used as a power bank, so you can charge small devices in an emergency. Mini work light LED torch built-in battery with 2200 capacity, the working time is 3-8 hours and the light range can reach 100 metres charging time. Type C USB charging port provides fast and stable charging.

【Rotatable folding magnetic hook】The 180° rotating stand and magnet on the back ensure perfect placement to meet your different requirements for lighting the work area. The LED workshop light has magnets that hold them where you need it, so you can work with two hands.
【Wide application of the LED inspection lamp】it is very small and portable, it can be used in camping, industry, workshop, home, yard or garage etc. It is very versatile.
description: Product Description Does it have a magnetic base? Yes, this inspection lamp does have a magnetic base. Is it waterproof? Yes, this inspection lamp has an IPX6 waterproof rating. How long does it take to charge? This work light takes 2 hours to charge and has a working duration of 4 to 12 hours. What is the light range? The magnetic light range of the inspection lamp can reach up to 100 metres.
